ignoreCommand: echo 'Skipped: deployments run via GitHub Actions only' && exit 0

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://*.supabase.co; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https://ui-avatars.com https://i.pravatar.cc https://api.qrserver.com https://*.supabase.co https://lh3.googleusercontent.com https://*.licdn.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://api.qrserver.com; frame-ancestors 'none';
